---
title: "Structural Determinants of Heterogeneous Suicide Mortality Trends"
subtitle: "Data Integration Script"
author: "Tu nombre"
date: today
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Setup — Cargar paquetes

```{r}
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(countrycode)
library(janitor)
```

## 1. Tasas de suicidio (WHO GHE)

```{r}
suicide <- read_csv("01_MORTALIDAD.csv") %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  select(
    iso3 = iso3,
    country = country,
    year = year,
    suicide_rate =  suicide_rate
  ) %>%
  filter(year >= 2010 & year <= 2021)

cat("Países:", n_distinct(suicide$iso3), "\n")
cat("Filas:", nrow(suicide), "\n")
glimpse(suicide)
```

## 2. Psiquiatras (WHO Mental Health Atlas)

```{r}
psychiatrists <- read_csv("02_psychiatrists_WHO_atlas_clean.csv") 
cat("Países:", nrow(psychiatrists), "\n")
glimpse(psychiatrists)
```

## 3. UHC Index (WHO)

```{r}
uhc <- read_csv("03_uhc_index_WHO_clean.csv") %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  select(
    country = geo_name,    # ← minúsculas
    year = dim_time,       # ← minúsculas
    uhc_index = index_n    # ← minúsculas
  ) %>%
  filter(year >= 2010 & year <= 2021)

# Agregar iso3 usando countrycode
uhc <- uhc %>%
  mutate(iso3 = countrycode(country, 
                            origin = "country.name", 
                            destination = "iso3c"))

# Verificar cuántos quedaron sin iso3
cat("UHC sin iso3:", sum(is.na(uhc$iso3)), "\n")

uhc <- uhc %>%
  mutate(iso3 = countrycode(country, 
                            origin = "country.name", 
                            destination = "iso3c")) %>%
  filter(!is.na(iso3))  # elimina regiones y agregados

cat("UHC países reales:", n_distinct(uhc$iso3), "\n")

```

## 4. Exceso de mortalidad COVID (WHO)

```{r}
excess_mortality <- read_excel("10_WHO_excess_mortality_COVID_by_country_clean.xlsx",
                               sheet = "Sheet2") %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  select(
    iso3,
    year,
    excess_mortality_covid
  )
```

## 5. Clasificación de ingresos (World Bank OGHIST)

```{r}
temp <- read_excel("08_worldbank_income_classification_OGHIST.xlsx",
                   sheet = "Country Analytical History",
                   skip = 5) %>%
  clean_names()

names(temp)  # ver TODOS los nombres
```


```{r}
income <- read_excel("08_worldbank_income_classification_OGHIST.xlsx",
                     sheet = "Country Analytical History",
                     skip = 5) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  rename(
    iso3 = x1,
    country_name = data_for_calendar_year
  ) %>%
  select(iso3, country_name, 
         x2010, x2011, x2012, x2013, x2014, 
         x2015, x2016, x2017, x2018, x2019, 
         x2020, x2021) %>%
  filter(!is.na(iso3) & nchar(iso3) == 3) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = starts_with("x20"),
    names_to = "year_col",
    values_to = "income_group"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    year = as.numeric(str_remove(year_col, "x")),
    income_group = case_when(
      income_group == "H"  ~ "High income",
      income_group == "UM" ~ "Upper middle income",
      income_group == "LM" ~ "Lower middle income",
      income_group == "L"  ~ "Low income",
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  ) %>%
  select(iso3, year, income_group)

cat("Filas:", nrow(income), "\n")
glimpse(income)
```
```{r}
cat("suicide:", n_distinct(suicide$iso3), "países\n")
cat("psychiatrists:", n_distinct(psychiatrists$iso3), "países\n")
cat("income:", n_distinct(income$iso3), "países\n")
cat("excess_mortality:", n_distinct(excess_mortality$iso3), "países\n")
cat("uhc:", n_distinct(uhc$iso3), "países\n")
```
```{r}
## Cargar physicians

physicians <- read_csv("04_physicians_WHO_clean.csv") %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  select(
    country = geo_name_short,
    year = dim_time,
    physicians_per_10000 = rate_per_10000_n
  ) %>%
  filter(year >= 2010 & year <= 2021) %>%
  mutate(
    iso3 = countrycode(country, "country.name", "iso3c"),
    physicians_per_100k = physicians_per_10000 / 10
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(iso3)) %>%
  group_by(iso3) %>%
  summarise(physicians_per_100k = mean(physicians_per_100k, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop")

cat("Physicians:", nrow(physicians), "países\n")
```
```{r}
temp_unicef <- read_excel("09_UNICEF_mental_health_2030_filtered_2010_2021.xlsx") %>%
  clean_names()

names(temp_unicef)
head(temp_unicef, 3)
```
```{r}
temp_unicef %>%
  filter(str_detect(indicator, 
                    "psychiatr|beds|nurse|mental health expend|expenditure")) %>%
  select(indicator) %>%
  distinct()
```
```{r}
## Cargar y procesar UNICEF Mental Health 2030

unicef_mh <- read_excel("09_UNICEF_mental_health_2030_FULL_backup.xlsx") %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  filter(indicator %in% c(
    "Total number of psychiatrists (per 100,000 population)",
    "Total mental health beds (number per 100,000 population)"
  )) %>%
  mutate(
    iso3 = countrycode(country_unms, "country.name", "iso3c"),
    value_numeric = as.numeric(value_3)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(iso3) & !is.na(value_numeric)) %>%
  group_by(iso3, indicator) %>%
  summarise(value = mean(value_numeric, na.rm = TRUE),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = indicator,
    values_from = value
  ) %>%
  clean_names() %>%
  rename(
    psychiatrists_unicef = total_number_of_psychiatrists_per_100_000_population,
    beds_unicef = total_mental_health_beds_number_per_100_000_population
  )

cat("UNICEF MH países:", nrow(unicef_mh), "\n")
glimpse(unicef_mh)
```


```{r}
## Merge final actualizado

dataset <- suicide_delta %>%
  left_join(income_mode, by = "iso3") %>%
  left_join(unicef_mh, by = "iso3") %>%
  left_join(physicians, by = "iso3") %>%
  left_join(uhc_mean, by = "iso3") %>%
  left_join(excess_mortality %>%
              select(iso3, excess_mortality_covid),
            by = "iso3")

cat("Dataset final:", nrow(dataset), "países\n")
cat("Columnas:", ncol(dataset), "\n")

# Missing values
cat("\nValores faltantes:\n")
colSums(is.na(dataset))
```

```{r}
## Guardar dataset analítico final

write_csv(dataset, "C:/Users/CAMILA/OneDrive - UNIVERSIDAD DE INGENIERIA Y TECNOLOGIA/Documents/ProyectoBiostats/DATA/CLEAN/dataset_analitico_final.csv")

cat("Dataset guardado exitosamente\n")
cat("Ruta: DATA/CLEAN/dataset_analitico_final.csv\n")

# Verificar missing values por columna
cat("\nValores faltantes por variable:\n")
colSums(is.na(dataset))
```

Revisión rápida
```{r}
## Revisión final del dataset

# 1. Vista general
glimpse(dataset)

# 2. Estadísticas descriptivas de todas las variables
summary(dataset)

# 3. Ver primeras y últimas filas
head(dataset, 10)
tail(dataset, 10)

# 4. Verificar que delta_suicide tiene sentido
# (valores entre -10 y +10 aproximadamente)
range(dataset$delta_suicide, na.rm = TRUE)

# 5. Distribución por grupo de ingreso
dataset %>%
  count(income_group) %>%
  arrange(desc(n))

# 6. Ver países sin psiquiatras (los 42 NAs)
dataset %>%
  filter(is.na(psychiatrists_unicef)) %>%
  select(country, income_group) %>%
  print(n = 50)
```
